description: May exploits a moment with Snowflake to free herself, overpowering Snowflake and then attacking Sarge. She asserts her strength and gains the upper hand in the struggle, turning the tables on her captors.

transcript.line: You must like what you see, always staring at me.
Your boss runs a tight crew. Everyone has a role. But you, I can't figure out.
I was gonna go with nuts. He even said you're unhinged. Probably why he didn't want you here when we had our talk earlier.
I dig the unyielding-warrior vibe, but you've clearly closed yourself off from the universe.
You don't even know what you don't know. I can help you break free from your chrysalis of negativity.
You'll be reborn, and then you'll see...
I told you I'd make it hurt.
I thought you were coming around.
He was your dream. I'm your nightmare.
I thought you loved this face.
Told you it was easy to drift off.
